hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】随着美联储和全球央行调整利率决策，比特币维持在 74,000 美元以上；【FINANCE】市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭；【FINANCE】摩根大通在降低软件贷款后限制向私人信贷公司提供贷款。

items.title: Bitcoin holds above $74,000 as Fed and global central banks line up rate decisions
items.summary: Bitcoin steadies in the mid-$70,000 ahead of a pivotal slate of central bank decision as early signs of recovery emerge, per multiple analysts.
items.title_zh: 随着美联储和全球央行调整利率决策，比特币维持在 74,000 美元以上
items.summary_zh: 多位分析师表示，随着复苏的早期迹象出现，在央行做出关键决定之前，比特币稳定在 70,000 美元左右。

items.title: Markets' hopes for Fed interest rate cuts are rapidly fading away
items.summary: As both energy prices and inflation fears pop higher, expectations for cuts are sliding lower.
items.title_zh: 市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭
items.summary_zh: 随着能源价格和通胀担忧的加剧，削减开支的预期正在下降。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase reins in lending to private credit firms after marking down software loans
items.summary: JPMorgan's move shows that the biggest U.S. bank by assets wants to get ahead of potential turbulence involving private credit loans to software companies.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通在降低软件贷款后限制向私人信贷公司提供贷款
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的举动表明，按资产计算，这家美国最大的银行希望在涉及向软件公司提供私人信贷贷款的潜在动荡之前先行一步。

items.title: Strategy’s latest massive bitcoin purchase offers insight into its evolving funding model
items.summary: A $1.18 billion preferred stock raise, roughly equivalent to 16,800 BTC, signals a shift away from common stock as dividend obligations top $1 billion.
items.title_zh: Strategy 最新的大规模比特币购买让人们深入了解其不断发展的融资模式
items.summary_zh: 优先股融资 11.8 亿美元，大约相当于 16,800 比特币，标志着随着股息义务超过 10 亿美元，普通股的转变。

items.title: Bitcoin beat the S&P 500, Nasdaq Composite and gold since the start of the Iran war
items.summary: ProShares' Simeon Hyman is highlighting a bullish bitcoin trend.
items.title_zh: 自伊朗战争爆发以来，比特币击败了标准普尔 500 指数、纳斯达克综合指数和黄金
items.summary_zh: ProShares 的 Simeon Hyman 强调了看涨的比特币趋势。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Israel Says It Has Killed Iran’s De Facto Leader
items.summary: Ali Larijani, Iran’s top security official, was killed in an overnight strike, the Israeli military said. His death would deal another severe blow to Iran’s power structure.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：以色列称已杀死伊朗事实上的领导人
items.summary_zh: 以色列军方称，伊朗最高安全官员阿里·拉里贾尼在夜间袭击中身亡。他的去世将对伊朗的权力结构造成又一次严重打击。

items.title: Apollo's John Zito questions private equity's software valuations: 'All the marks are wrong'
items.summary: While Wall Street figures have flagged risks in private credit, Apollo's Zito is among the first within private credit to candidly acknowledge weakness.
items.title_zh: Apollo 的 John Zito 质疑私募股权公司的软件估值：“所有标记都是错误的”
items.summary_zh: 尽管华尔街的数据已经指出了私人信贷的风险，但阿波罗的 Zito 是私人信贷领域最先坦诚承认疲软的人之一。

items.title: Holiday spending, export demand drive China’s economic momentum as Iran war headwinds loom
items.summary: Beijing tamped down its GDP growth target this year to a range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal on record going back to the early 1990s.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争逆风逼近，假期消费、出口需求推动中国经济增长
items.summary_zh: 北京将今年的GDP增长目标下调至4.5%至5%，这是自20世纪90年代初以来有记录以来最不雄心勃勃的目标。

items.title: Dividend stocks are catching up to tech stocks on a key earnings metric at a critical time for the market
items.summary: Dividend stocks are closing the earnings growth gap with tech stocks, a reason for investors seeking safety in a volatile market to favor income opportunities.
items.title_zh: 在市场的关键时刻，股息股在一项关键盈利指标上正在追赶科技股
items.summary_zh: 股息股正在缩小与科技股的盈利增长差距，这是投资者在动荡的市场中寻求安全以青睐收入机会的原因。

items.title: Inside JPMorgan Chase's push to become the startup world’s new Silicon Valley Bank
items.summary: For JPMorgan Chase, winning the niche of startup banking from rivals is about more than just gaining deposits: It's a bet to future-proof the largest U.S. bank.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通致力于成为初创企业界的新硅谷银行
items.summary_zh: 对于摩根大通来说，从竞争对手手中赢得初创银行业务的利基市场不仅仅是获得存款：这是对美国最大银行面向未来的赌注。

items.title: Trump seeks to delay meeting with Xi in China
items.summary: The escalating war in Iran has overshadowed many of the US' foreign policy objectives
items.title_zh: 特朗普寻求推迟与习近平在中国的会面
items.summary_zh: 伊朗战争不断升级给美国的许多外交政策目标蒙上阴影

items.title: Utah mother who wrote book about grief found guilty of poisoning husband
items.summary: A jury found that Kouri Richins killed her husband in March 2022 by poisoning him with a fentanyl-laced drink.
items.title_zh: 犹他州母亲写了一本关于悲伤的书，被判毒害丈夫
items.summary_zh: 陪审团发现，Kouri Richins 于 2022 年 3 月用含有芬太尼的饮料毒死了她的丈夫。

items.title: And the burger goes to... Michael B Jordan marks Oscars win at In-N-Out
items.summary: Hours after winning best actor, Jordan joins an exclusive list of famous faces to celebrate an Oscar victory with a burger.
items.title_zh: 汉堡送给...迈克尔·B·乔丹 (Michael B Jordan) 在 In-N-Out 上赢得奥斯卡奖
items.summary_zh: 获得最佳男主角奖几小时后，乔丹加入了名人面孔的独家名单，用汉堡庆祝奥斯卡胜利。

items.title: Columbia University protester released after one year in immigration custody
items.summary: Federal officials say Leqaa Kordia overstayed her student visa. Her lawyer says she was targeted for pro-Palestinian activism.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚大学抗议者在被移民拘留一年后获释
items.summary_zh: 联邦官员表示，莱卡·科尔迪亚的学生签证逾期居留。她的律师称，她因亲巴勒斯坦激进主义而成为目标。

items.title: Inside the Supply Line Delivering American Guns to Mexican Cartels
items.summary: A surge of weapons is flowing from the U.S. to Mexico. These firearms — sourced from gun shops, shows, websites and apps — are funneled across the border to fuel the country’s most violent crimes.
items.title_zh: 向墨西哥贩毒集团运送美国枪支的供应线内部
items.summary_zh: 大量武器正在从美国流向墨西哥。这些枪支来自枪支商店、表演、网站和应用程序，跨境流动，助长了该国最暴力的犯罪活动。

items.title: At Least 23 Killed in Nigeria as Insurgent Attacks Go On Despite U.S. Help
items.summary: A teaching hospital and two markets in the city of Maiduguri were hit in what a military spokesman said were suicide bombings by Boko Haram.
items.title_zh: 尽管有美国帮助，尼日利亚叛乱分子袭击仍造成至少 23 人死亡
items.summary_zh: 迈杜古里市的一家教学医院和两个市场遭到袭击，军方发言人称这是博科圣地的自杀式爆炸袭击。

items.title: Trump Signals He May Intervene in Cuba Following Iran and Venezuela
items.summary: Still at war with Iran and in control in Venezuela, President Trump is signaling that he is about to intervene in another country.
items.title_zh: 特朗普暗示他可能继伊朗和委内瑞拉之后对古巴进行干预
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统仍在与伊朗交战并控制着委内瑞拉，他发出信号称他即将对另一个国家进行干预。

items.title: Sucked Into War, Gulf Countries Face the Limits of U.S. Security Guarantees
items.summary: Barraged by Iranian attacks and questioning the value of security ties with the United States, nations in the Gulf have turned to Ukraine, Australia and Italy for help.
items.title_zh: 陷入战争的海湾国家面临美国安全保障的限制
items.summary_zh: 由于受到伊朗袭击以及对与美国安全关系价值的质疑，海湾国家已向乌克兰、澳大利亚和意大利寻求帮助。

items.title: As American Bombers Take Off From R.A.F. Fairford in UK, Iraq War Looms Large
items.summary: R.A.F. Fairford was the site of repeated antiwar protests during the Iraq war in 2003. Now it is being used again as a base for U.S. bombing missions in the Middle East.
items.title_zh: 当美国轰炸机从英国皇家空军起飞时英国费尔福德，伊拉克战争迫在眉睫
items.summary_zh: 英国皇家空军费尔福德是 2003 年伊拉克战争期间多次反战抗议的场所。现在，它再次被用作美国在中东执行轰炸任务的基地。

items.title: What the Iran War Means for the U.S.-China Relationship
items.summary: With the Xi-Trump summit almost certainly delayed, and tensions rising over the war in Iran, vital issues for both the U.S. and China are also being cast into uncertainty.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争对中美关系意味着什么
items.summary_zh: 由于习近平与特朗普的峰会几乎肯定会推迟，加上伊朗战争引发的紧张局势加剧，对美国和中国来说至关重要的问题也陷入了不确定性。

items.title: U.S. Democrats target government officials gaming prediction markets on war action
items.summary: Potential indicators of prior-knowledge bets on U.S. military action spurred Democrats from the Senate and House of Representatives to introduce a new bill.
items.title_zh: 美国民主党瞄准政府官员利用战争行动来博弈预测市场
items.summary_zh: 对美国军事行动的先验知识押注的潜在指标促使参议院和众议院的民主党人提出了一项新法案。

items.title: U.S. regional banks building tokenized deposit network on ZKsync to rival stablecoins
items.summary: The Cari Network is targeting a 2026 rollout as banks test issuance, transfers and redemption of digital deposits. Participating banks include Huntington Bancshares, First Horizon, M&T Bank, KeyCorp and Old National Bancorp.
items.title_zh: 美国地区银行在 ZKsync 上构建代币化存款网络以与稳定币竞争
items.summary_zh: Cari Network 的目标是在 2026 年推出，届时银行将测试数字存款的发行、转账和赎回。参与银行包括 Huntington Bancshares、First Horizo​​n、M&T Bank、KeyCorp 和 Old National Bancorp。

items.title: Bitcoin Layer 2 Stacks says its latest upgrade boosts DeFi capacity by up to 30x
items.summary: Muneeb Ali's Stacks Labs said its SIP-034 upgrade has now been implemented, boosting effective capacity for certain DeFi applications.
items.title_zh: 比特币 Layer 2 Stacks 表示其最新升级将 DeFi 容量提高了 30 倍
items.summary_zh: Muneeb Ali 的 Stacks Labs 表示，其 SIP-034 升级现已实施，提高了某些 DeFi 应用的有效容量。

items.title: CFTC won’t pursue broker registration action against Phantom over derivatives trading feature
items.summary: The CFTC considers Phantom’s proposed feature as a passive software interface, with users trading directly through regulated brokers.
items.title_zh: CFTC 不会就衍生品交易功能对 Phantom 采取经纪商注册行动
items.summary_zh: CFTC 认为 Phantom 提议的功能是一种被动软件界面，用户可以直接通过受监管的经纪商进行交易。

items.title: PayPal expands PYUSD stablecoin access to 70 markets
items.summary: PayPal has expanded access to its PYUSD stablecoin to 70 markets, enabling wallet access, transfers, and rewards for eligible users.
items.title_zh: PayPal 将 PYUSD 稳定币扩展到 70 个市场
items.summary_zh: PayPal 已将其 PYUSD 稳定币的使用范围扩大到 70 个市场，为符合条件的用户提供钱包访问、转账和奖励。

items.title: Vietnam prepares to restrict overseas crypto trading as banks, brokers bid for new local licenses: report
items.summary: Vietnam plans to restrict citizens from overseas crypto trading as banks and brokerages compete for new domestic licenses.
items.title_zh: 随着银行、经纪商竞标新的本地许可证，越南准备限制海外加密货币交易：报告
items.summary_zh: 随着银行和经纪公司争夺新的国内许可证，越南计划限制公民进行海外加密货币交易。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Verified Emeralds (VEREM)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #772.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：验证祖母绿（VEREM）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#772。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Aster (ASTER)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #46.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Aster (ASTER)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 46 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #14.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 14。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #23.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 23 位。

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
items.title_zh: 人工智能能否帮助预测哪些心力衰竭患者会在一年内病情恶化？
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院、麻省总医院和哈佛医学院的研究人员开发了一种深度学习模型，可以提前一年预测患者的心力衰竭预后。

items.title: New method could increase LLM training efficiency
items.summary: By leveraging idle computing time, researchers can double the speed of model training while preserving accuracy.
items.title_zh: 新方法可以提高LLM培训效率
items.summary_zh: 通过利用空闲计算时间，研究人员可以将模型训练的速度提高一倍，同时保持准确性。

items.title: Lobster buffet: China’s tech firms feast on OpenClaw as companies race to deploy AI agents
items.summary: China-based usage of OpenClaw has already topped that of the U.S., while driving demand for Chinese lower-cost AI models.
items.title_zh: 龙虾自助餐：中国科技公司竞相部署人工智能代理，享受 OpenClaw 盛宴
items.summary_zh: 中国的 OpenClaw 使用量已经超过美国，同时推动了对中国低成本人工智能模型的需求。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 02/23/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Monday, 02/23/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Evaluating Reversal Potential in Niche Alternative ETFs [Quantpedia] Alternative ETFs sit at an unusual intersection of pub
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日星期一 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！评估利基另类 ETF 的逆转潜力 [Quantpedia] 另类 ETF 位于酒吧的一个不寻常的交叉点

items.title: Crypto trading firm GSR expands token advisory with $57 million in acquisitions
items.summary: The firm, best known for being one of the oldest crypto market makers, acquired Autonomous and Architech to combine token launch services, trading and treasury management tools.
items.title_zh: 加密货币交易公司 GSR 通过 5700 万美元的收购扩大代币咨询
items.summary_zh: 该公司以最古老的加密货币做市商之一而闻名，收购了 Autonomous 和 Architech，将代币发行服务、交易和财务管理工具结合起来。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) drops 4.1%, leading index lower
items.summary: Sui (SUI) joined Uniswap (UNI) as an underperformer, declining 4% from Monday.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：Uniswap (UNI) 下跌 4.1%，领先指数走低
items.summary_zh: Sui (SUI) 与 Uniswap (UNI) 一样表现不佳，较周一下跌 4%。

items.title: GSR expands into token lifecycle management with $57 million acquisition of Autonomous and Architech
items.summary: GSR, one of crypto's largest market makers, has acquired token launch platform Autonomous and crypto advisory firm Architech.
items.title_zh: GSR 斥资 5700 万美元收购 Autonomous 和 Architech，涉足代币生命周期管理
items.summary_zh: GSR 是加密货币最大的做市商之一，已收购代币发行平台 Autonomous 和加密货币咨询公司 Architech。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度
items.summary_zh: Wayfair 使用 OpenAI 模型来改善电子商务支持和产品目录准确性，自动进行票证分类并大规模增强数百万个产品属性。

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.title_zh: 从模型到代理：为 Responses API 配备计算机环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用响应 API、shell 工具和托管容器构建代理运行时，以使用文件、工具和状态运行安全、可扩展的代理。

items.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
items.summary: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.title_zh: 改善前沿法学硕士的教学层次
items.summary_zh: IH-Challenge 训练模型以优先考虑可信指令，改善指令层次结构、安全可操纵性以及对即时注入攻击的抵抗力。

items.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
items.summary: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.
items.title_zh: Codex 安全性：现在处于研究预览阶段
items.summary_zh: Codex Security 是一款 AI 应用程序安全代理，可分析项目上下文，以更高的置信度和更少的噪音来检测、验证和修补复杂的漏洞。

items.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
items.summary: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.
items.title_zh: Descript 如何实现大规模多语言视频配音
items.summary_zh: Descript 使用 OpenAI 模型来扩展多语言视频配音，优化含义和时间的翻译，使配音的语音在不同语言中听起来都很自然。

items.title: The First Healthcare Robotics Dataset and Foundational Physical AI Models for Healthcare Robotics
items.title_zh: 第一个医疗保健机器人数据集和医疗保健机器人基础物理人工智能模型

items.title: PRX Part 3 — Training a Text-to-Image Model in 24h!
items.title_zh: PRX 第 3 部分 — 在 24 小时内训练文本到图像模型！

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：专为大规模智能而打造
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 是我们迄今为止速度最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 3 系列型号。

items.title: Google and the Massachusetts AI Hub are launching a new AI training initiative for the Commonwealth.
items.summary: Google is partnering with the Massachusetts AI Hub to provide every Baystater with no-cost access to Google’s AI training.
items.title_zh: 谷歌和马萨诸塞州人工智能中心正在为联邦启动一项新的人工智能培训计划。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在与马萨诸塞州人工智能中心合作，为每个 Baystater 提供免费的谷歌人工智能培训机会。

items.title: Get more context and understand translations more deeply with new AI-powered updates in Translate.
items.summary: New alternatives, “understand” and “ask” buttons in Google Translate help you navigate the complexities of natural language.
items.title_zh: 通过 Translate 中全新的人工智能驱动的更新，获取更多背景信息并更深入地理解翻译。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译中的新替代方案“理解”和“询问”按钮可帮助您应对自然语言的复杂性。

items.title: 3 Questions: Building predictive models to characterize tumor progression
items.summary: Assistant Professor Matthew Jones is working to decode molecular processes on the genetic, epigenetic, and microenvironment levels to anticipate how and when tumors evolve to resist treatment.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：建立预测模型来表征肿瘤进展
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Matthew Jones 致力于解码遗传、表观遗传和微环境水平上的分子过程，以预测肿瘤如何以及何时进化以抵抗治疗。

items.title: How Joseph Paradiso’s sensing innovations bridge the arts, medicine, and ecology
items.summary: From early motion-sensing platforms to environmental monitoring, the professor and head of the Program in Media Arts and Sciences has turned decades of cross-disciplinary research into real-world impact.
items.title_zh: Joseph Paradiso 的传感创新如何架起艺术、医学和生态学的桥梁
items.summary_zh: 从早期的运动传感平台到环境监测，这位教授兼媒体艺术与科学项目的负责人将数十年的跨学科研究转化为现实世界的影响。

items.title: Improving AI models’ ability to explain their predictions
items.summary: A new approach could help users know whether to trust a model’s predictions in safety-critical applications like health care and autonomous driving.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能模型解释其预测的能力
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以帮助用户知道是否信任模型在医疗保健和自动驾驶等安全关键应用中的预测。

items.title: Mastercard says it's acquiring stablecoin startup BVNK in $1.8 billion bet on future of payments
items.summary: Stablecoin startups have been a hot commodity since the reelection of President Donald Trump in late 2024 ushered in a new era of crypto-friendly regulation.

items.title: China talks up oil sufficiency as Trump seeks Beijing's help on securing Hormuz energy route

items.summary_zh: 国家统计局表示，中国能源供应“相对强劲”，同时宣布国内产量有所增加。

items.title: Trump says presidents 'should not have learning disabilities' as he mocks Newsom's dyslexia

items.summary_zh: 国家学习障碍中心表示对总统的言论感到“不安”。

items.summary_zh: 这是依赖海湾石油的亚洲国家采取的一系列措施中的最新一项。

items.title: Belgian court clears way for trial over 1961 killing of Congo PM Lumumba

items.summary_zh: 93 岁的前外交官艾蒂安·达维尼翁 (Etienne Davignon) 被指控参与刺杀独立英雄。

items.summary_zh: 这次袭击袭击了一个戒毒所，阿富汗誓言要进行报复，冒着两国冲突升级的风险。

items.title: What to Know About Ali Larijani, Iran’s Top Security Official

items.title: As Carney Seeks Canadian Alliances with China, India and Qatar, He Looks Away on Human Rights
items.summary: Canada’s prime minister chooses pragmatism in a turbulent world, which means doing business with countries that do not share Canada’s democratic values. Some critics see this as weakness.

items.title: Popular Solana wallet Phantom wins CFTC nod to access regulated derivatives markets
items.summary: This means Phantom can act as a non-custodial interface connecting users to registered derivatives platforms, removing the need for broker registration under specific conditions.
items.title_zh: 热门 Solana 钱包 Phantom 获得 CFTC 批准进入受监管的衍生品市场
items.summary_zh: 这意味着 Phantom 可以充当非托管接口，将用户连接到已注册的衍生品平台，从而无需在特定条件下进行经纪商注册。

items.title: Sam Altman's World teams up with Coinbase to prove there is a real person behind every AI transaction
items.summary: World said some estimates suggest agentic commerce could reach $3 trillion to $5 trillion by 2030, with agents accounting for up to 25% of U.S. e-commerce.
items.title_zh: Sam Altman's World 与 Coinbase 合作，证明每笔人工智能交易背后都有一个真人
items.summary_zh: World 表示，一些估计表明，到 2030 年，代理商务规模可能会达到 3 万亿至 5 万亿美元，其中代理商务占美国电子商务的比例高达 25%。

items.title: Vietnam pushes local crypto exchanges as Hanoi moves to block offshore trading: Reuters
items.summary: The move aims to regulate the country's growing crypto market and restrict trading on foreign platforms.

items.summary_zh: 此举旨在规范该国不断增长的加密货币市场并限制外国平台上的交易。

items.summary: The closed-end fund aims to give everyday investors exposure to private firms before they go public.

items.summary_zh: 该封闭式基金旨在让日常投资者在私营公司上市之前接触到它们。

items.title: 'Gensler and Biden were just better for crypto,' says Tally CEO as DAO governance platform shuts down

items.summary_zh: DAO 的终结？ Uniswap 和 Arbitrum 治理背后的公司表示，放松监管使权力下放成为可选

items.summary: AgentKit will enable World-verified individuals to delegate their World IDs to AI agents, including on Coinbase's x402 protocol.

items.summary_zh: AgentKit 将使经过 World 验证的个人能够将其 World ID 委托给 AI 代理，包括通过 Coinbase 的 x402 协议。

items.summary_zh: Digital Chamber 和国际金融技术平台 Money20/20 正在合作扩大政策讨论。

items.title: Robinhood’s startup fund invests roughly $35 million across Stripe and AI audio firm

items.summary_zh: 万事达卡表示，将以高达 18 亿美元的价格收购稳定币基础设施公司 BVNK，以连接链上和法定支付轨道。

items.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
